summary: Deep think + search + report on what the OGZ creation system is missing: reality-audit, web research (AI content systems / Saudi craft / taste-calibration / market), perspectives wheel, synthesis

report.executive_summary: Mohamed, your four named gaps are all REAL — I verified every one against the live repo, not the summary. The honest correction: the system is further along than the audit said (render_image.py is fully coded against fal and only refuses because of YOUR no_fal_photos ruling + absent key; calibrate_judge.py exists and has already run; a June-14 few-shot quarantine now strips banned exemplars). But that makes the verdict sharper, not softer: the machinery works, and the machinery is the wrong shape for the one thing that matters. The system is built almost entirely on the "don't" axis (filters, bans, 76 tests, deterministic gates) and almost not at all on the "this is great / this is MINE" axis. Three numbers prove it. (1) Your taste judge agrees with you 47% of the time on the pass-call with +0.08 rank correlation — and its average score for captions you rated "fail" (6.1) is statistically identical to ones you rated "good" (6.1): the judge literally cannot tell your good from your fail. (2) The COO "confidence" that gates shipping is a hardcoded formula with a 0.40 floor, so a culturally-clean caption you'd score 42/100 still computes to 0.83 confidence and auto-qualifies to SHIP — the confidence number is mathematically decoupled from whether the caption is any good. (3) The pen generates exactly ONE angle and a tiny caption set, then only filters/reorders them — it never generates many candidates and ranks for craft, which is the standard production cure for "clean but mediocre." Net: you have a strong, honest candidate-GENERATOR with a near-random quality-JUDGE and no positive craft engine. The output is "competent Arabic that is nobody's voice." That is not a bug to fix; it is the missing half of the system, and you have already named it correctly.

ranked_gaps.gap: The taste judge is near-random AND the ship-gate confidence is decoupled from quality — so 'GO' is structurally meaningless. Nothing in the pipeline is calibrated to your eye.
ranked_gaps.evidence: Live run of scripts/calibrate_judge.py (n=30 of your blind ratings): pass-call agreement 47%, rank correlation +0.08. Judge avg score by YOUR rating: fail=6.1, weak=6.2, good=6.1, excellent=7.5 — the judge cannot separate good from fail. coo_confidence() in scripts/c_suite.py is a fixed formula (0.40 floor + 0.30·arabic_qc + 0.15·occasion + 0.15·policy); a clean post you'd score 42/100 computes 0.40+0.126+0.15+0.15=0.826, and judge_post() ships at conf>=0.70 — mediocre auto-qualifies. taste.json client_calibration:[] (empty). review_results.json exists (you rated 30) but calibrate_judge consumes them as absolute 0-4 ratings, not pairwise.
ranked_gaps.why_it_matters: This is the moat. If the judge can't tell your good from your fail, every autonomous 'GO' is a coin-flip wearing a number, and the 568-caption / unattended-batch story is unvalidated by definition. The world-research is blunt: uncalibrated LLM judges agree with humans only ~58% on creative writing and are systematically overconfident — your +0.08 is the EXPECTED baseline, not a fluke. Until agreement-with-Mohamed is the metric, scaling production scales unvalidated output.
ranked_gaps.the_fix: Stop emitting AI confidence as if it were truth. (a) Replace the COO 0.40-floor formula gate with a judge whose only reported metric is AGREEMENT-with-you on held-out items; refuse a GO the judge hasn't earned. (b) Convert your portal clicks into PAIRWISE comparisons (A vs B), not 0-5 stars, and use active selection so you only label the ~few-dozen most informative pairs. (c) Fit a lightweight personal taste model from those pairs (personal preference models hit ~76% vs ~62% generic) and report judge↔Mohamed agreement toward the ~80% human-human ceiling.

ranked_gaps.gap: All guardrails, almost no craft. The pen generates ONE angle and filters it — it never generates many candidates and ranks for greatness. So output is 'clean but average / nobody's voice' (CCO 42/100).
ranked_gaps.evidence: scripts/render_client_slot.py make_angle() returns a SINGLE JSON angle (temp=0.8, one gpt call); render_captions produces a small set then only diversity_prefer()/taste_guard()/filter_options() REORDER or DROP — no quality ranking exists. scripts/caption_filter.py is pure pass/fail (check, cultural_check, length_check). 16 documented 'great moves' (CAPTION_RECIPES.md) are not invoked as positive steering. gold.json: eatjurisha 6, albaik 5, myfitness 1 exemplar. fingerprint.l2_voice for eatjurisha: dialect=null, register=null, tone=null, love_lines=[], hate_lines=[] — the 'warm Najdi voice' is a label, not a captured voice. cco_pass() even reads dialect from that null field.
ranked_gaps.why_it_matters: This is why three different brands produce the same underlying move (generic-warm-moment + product name + soft tail) and why a customer can't tell your post from a competitor's — a business failure, not just taste. The root cause is named in the research: RLHF mode-collapse / typicality bias drives models to the safe average, and you cannot out-ban it — more 'don't' clauses can't manufacture a great line. The standard cure (Best-of-N generate-then-rank with verifiers) is exactly the piece you don't have.
ranked_gaps.the_fix: Flip the pipeline from filter to RANK. (a) Generate 5-10 angle/caption candidates per slot (add Verbalized Sampling: ask for N candidates with probabilities — a free prompt change with measured 1.6-2.1x diversity at maintained quality, attacking mode-collapse at the root). (b) Have the CD brains + CCO act as ASPECT VERIFIERS that rank the pool pairwise and surface the single best; gates stay as hard filters. (c) Capture each client's real voice into l2_voice (dialect/register/love_lines/hate_lines) and few-shot the love_lines as POSITIVE steering — and wire the 16 recipes as craft moves the ranker rewards.

ranked_gaps.gap: Reputation-protecting guards LEAK. A fabricated named-real-person scene and your own confirmed kill-rulings both came out the pipe.
ranked_gaps.evidence: clients/myfitness.sa/posts/2026-11-09__evergreen__v5.json idea.scene_ar invents «الكابتن عادل» + «الكابتن أحمد» in a gym + a Snapchat scene, with rendered captions — despite cultural_overrides.real_person_mentions='off' (but confirmer=pending_client, confidence=experimental). albaik year_map.json lines 1056/1104 carry «منتج حقيقي: التوأم كرسبي بيك» — note: التوأم and كرسبي بيك ARE both in truth_pack.product_candidates, so this is a real-token RECOMBINATION fused into a non-existent SKU, not pure invention (the perspective overstated 'invents a product' — but the fusion risk is real). taste.json kill_patterns has your 2026-06-13 'family_scene_overuse' and 'delivery_app_cta_overuse' rulings, yet jurisha output kept leaning on gathering scenes + اطلب-من-جاهز CTAs (which forced the June-14 few-shot quarantine fix).
ranked_gaps.why_it_matters: This is the deepest violation of the TOP — 'a post the client would PROUDLY post.' One post that puts a fabricated scene on a named real captain, or fuses two real product names into a SKU the client doesn't sell, is a credibility hit the owner eats personally — possibly legal. And when YOUR explicit 'stop doing X' shows up next week, the owner loses faith in the whole machine. Per your own Rule #6/#8, an experimental/unconfirmed-truth profile should HARD-FAIL, not emit a candidate.
ranked_gaps.the_fix: (a) Promote real_person_mentions / product-name grounding from soft prompt-bans to deterministic HARD gates that REFUSE (exit non-zero) on any named real person or any product string not exactly in product_candidates — fused tokens fail. (b) Make experimental/pending_client cultural_overrides block 'ship' entirely, not just warn. (c) Treat your kill-rulings as the highest-signal calibration data: feed them to the ranker as negative training, not just a prompt ban — the June-14 quarantine is the right instinct; finish it as a gate, not a reorder.

ranked_gaps.gap: It's half a post: no image, and it never touches reality or its own knowledge. The 'drives business' half of the TOP is unmeasured.
ranked_gaps.evidence: scripts/render_image.py is fully coded against fal-ai/flux/schnell but hard-refuses on your no_fal_photos ruling (2026-06-12) + absent FAL_KEY — so every 'post' is caption + a phone_shoot_card homework assignment, not a finished post. No real client, no engagement data — the taste loop is closed AI-on-AI. research_ledger.jsonl is write-only: eatjurisha/albaik/myfitness each have exactly 3 entries, ALL status='open', zero fulfilled; the requests are generic ('Research competitive positioning... in the Saudi food delivery market'). The Brain API (:4100), 100 benchmark accounts, and 568-caption corpus exist in-repo but are not queried during generation.
ranked_gaps.why_it_matters: You cannot validate 'a post the client would proudly post AND that drives business' on a caption + a to-do list — you and the client are still rating an imagined post. And a write-only research organ is a lie that looks like progress (your own Consumer Law): the CEO brief asks 'what to research?', logs it, and nobody ever answers, so the CD brains render blind to the very gaps the system identified.
ranked_gaps.the_fix: (a) Generate the actual image so you rate a COMPLETE post (turn render_image.py on for a tiny judging batch — schnell is ~$0.003/img, batches of 20 max per your money rule; the spend buys the only honest artifact). (b) Instrument ONE real account end-to-end so engagement becomes the missing 'drives business' signal. (c) Close the research loop: a small agent that reads each open research_request, queries the Brain API / benchmarks / corpus, writes the answer back to the ledger (status=closed), and feeds it to make_angle BEFORE render — the retrieval grounding the minds currently lack.

world_findings: LLM judges agree with humans only ~58% on CREATIVE writing (vs ~80% on general tasks) and exhibit self-preference bias when judging sibling models — so your 47%-agreement / +0.08 judge is the EXPECTED baseline for an uncalibrated AI judging Saudi creative, not a fluke. The world's answer is to report judge↔human AGREEMENT as the only valid metric, never AI self-confidence.

RLHF makes models systematically OVERCONFIDENT and confidence does not predict quality — which is exactly why your coo_confidence formula (0.40 floor) and any 'GO' verdict are structurally unreliable. The world stopped using model confidence as a quality proxy.

The standard production cure for 'confident but mediocre' is Best-of-N generate-then-RANK with verifiers — generate 5-10 candidates, then rank (ideally pairwise) with aspect-verifiers. Your pipeline generates ~single-shot and only FILTERS; it never ranks for craft. This is the single biggest architectural gap vs current practice.

RLHF alignment causes 'mode collapse / typicality bias' — the named root cause of clean-but-average output. Verbalized Sampling (ask the model for N candidates with probabilities) is a free, prompt-level fix with measured 1.6-2.1x diversity gain at maintained quality. You are not using it; it attacks CCO=42 at the root instead of adding more bans.

You do NOT need thousands of labels to calibrate. Active / Fisher-information preference learning calibrates a personal taste model from a small, optimally-chosen set of PAIRWISE comparisons (dozens, not thousands). Personal preference models reach ~76% accuracy vs ~62% for generic — the moat is buildable cheaply, but only from pairwise clicks, not 0-5 stars.

Ungoverned creative teams shipped ~89% campaign errors in 2025 — so your heavy investment in gates/red-lines/76 tests is JUSTIFIED and ahead of the field on the safety axis. The imbalance is the problem: world-class systems pair that negative axis with an equally strong positive/craft + human-calibration + outcome axis. You built one wing of the plane.

'Translation fluency is not localization': a single opaque quality number (CCO=42) is undiagnosable. The field uses multi-axis NATIVE rubrics (dialect/register, cultural fit, hook strength, holistic) so failures are locatable — and your cco_pass currently judges 'Saudi-native correctness' against a dialect field that is literally null.
recommended_sequence: 1. FIRST — Gap 3 hard-gate the reputation leaks (effort S, ~1 day). Promote real_person_mentions + product-string grounding from soft prompt-bans to deterministic REFUSE gates, and make experimental/pending_client overrides block 'ship'. Cheapest, highest-trust: stops a fabricated-captain or fused-SKU post from ever reaching you. Do this before you generate anything new.

2. SECOND — Gap 1 build the pairwise taste loop (effort M). Switch the portal from 0-5 stars to A-vs-B pairwise, fit a lightweight Mohamed-taste model with active selection (only the ~dozens of most-informative pairs), and make judge↔Mohamed AGREEMENT the only ship metric — retiring the 0.40-floor confidence formula. This is the moat; everything downstream is unvalidated without it. It also gives the ranker in step 3 something real to rank against.

3. THIRD — Gap 2 flip filter→rank + capture voice (effort M). Add Verbalized Sampling to make_angle/render_captions (generate N candidates), have the CD brains + CCO rank the pool pairwise via the step-2 model, and capture each client's real l2_voice (dialect/love_lines/hate_lines) to few-shot as POSITIVE steering. This is what turns 'clean but average' into 'great + theirs' — but only works after the judge can tell good from bad (step 2).

4. FOURTH — Gap 4a generate the real image for ONE small judging batch (effort S-M). With the taste loop live, turn render_image.py on for ~20 posts (schnell, ~$0.003 each, per your money rule) so you rate COMPLETE posts, not homework. Now your judgment trains on the real artifact.

5. LAST — Gap 4b/c close the outcome + research loops (effort L). Instrument ONE real account for engagement (the missing 'drives business' signal) and build the small agent that fulfills research_requests (query Brain API / benchmarks / corpus → write answer back → feed make_angle). Highest effort, depends on a calibrated system being worth pointing at reality.
report.honest_verdict: On track on the HARD half, off track on the half that is the whole point. You have genuinely built the rare thing — an honest, autonomous candidate-generator with real deterministic gates, 5 CD brains as code, and a safety axis ahead of most of the industry. Nothing here is fake or broken. But the system's center of gravity is in the wrong place: it is ~90% a 'don't ship something bad' machine and ~10% a 'this is great and unmistakably theirs' machine, and the one organ that is supposed to embody your taste — the judge — is provably near-random (47% agreement, can't separate your good from your fail) while the gate that decides shipping (coo_confidence) is mathematically decoupled from quality. So today the system can run unattended and produce clean Arabic that is nobody's voice, and call it GO. The single most important move: STOP treating any AI score as truth and build the pairwise calibration loop — convert your clicks into A-vs-B comparisons, fit a Mohamed-taste model, and make judge↔Mohamed agreement the only thing that earns a GO. Until that exists, every other improvement (better candidates, real images, real clients) scales output you cannot trust. Build the judge that has earned the right to say GO; then give it Best-of-N candidates worth choosing between. That is the moat, and it is buildable in weeks, not months.
